raw_response_text:
<features>
- Flower color is bright pink/purple.
- Petals are broad and radiate from the center.
- Center has a cluster of white/yellow stamens.
- Background consists of green leaves.
</features>
<kb>
- IF the flower is pink/purple/maroon with radiating petals and a central cluster of stamens THEN class is 81.
- IF the flower is yellow with distinct, drooping petals and specific markings THEN class is 14.
</kb>
<rule_check>
- The target image shows a pink/purple flower with radiating petals and a central cluster of stamens. This matches the visual features of the examples labeled '81'. It does not match the yellow, drooping petals of the examples labeled '14'.
</rule_check>

<response>81</response>

raw_response_text:
<features>
- Yellow petals with reddish-brown markings on the lower petals
- Distinctive drooping lower petals (falls) and upright upper petals (standards)
- Green stem and leaves in the background
</features>
<kb>
- IF the flower is pink/magenta with a white center and prominent stamens THEN class is 81
- IF the flower is yellow with drooping petals and dark markings on the falls THEN class is 14
</kb>
<rule_check>
- The target image shows a yellow flower with drooping petals and reddish-brown markings, which matches the visual features of class 14 (yellow iris). It does not match the pink/magenta flowers of class 81.
</rule_check>

<response>14</response>
